item.title: ADC is available in winget
item.description:
ADC is now officially available in Winget, wait for Winget to fetch in a few hours and then you should be able to install with:
winget install Mealman1551.ADCArchiver

item.title: ADC will soon be downloadable via Winget
item.description:
ADC will soon be downloadable and installable via Microsoft Winget. Today i opened a pull request on the Winget community repository, adding ADC 1.4.5 into the repo. It only waits on approval, after approved status ADC is downloadable with:
```powershell winget install Mealman1551.ADCArchiver ```

item.title: New ADC 1.5.0 RC2 binaries released
item.description: ADC 1.5.0 RC2 binaries and tarballs have been released, the new RC2 contains the most up to date Python Cryptography library
